name: mcp-server-browser-kit
description: An MCP Server for interacting with manifest v2 compatible browsers.

rating.reason: Good documentation with comprehensive descriptions and clear workflow guidance. Tool names are descriptive and purposeful. Descriptions effectively explain functionality, usage context, and include helpful workflow steps. Parameter documentation is clear with appropriate examples. Minor deduction for some overly verbose descriptions with excessive emoji usage, but overall maintains high clarity and completeness across all tools.
